task_description: Fix Git merge (unrelated histories) then implement Epic 2: Deepgram Voice Agent V1 SDK connection and keepAlive() in Python

patterns.connection_pattern: Use context manager: 'with client.agent.v1.connect() as connection:'
patterns.settings_pattern: Send AgentV1SettingsMessage in OPEN event handler

existing_implementations.description: Greenfield project - no existing Python code. Epic 1 was done in Node.js worktree but Epic 2 requires Python.
existing_implementations.tech_stack_change: Epic 1 used Node.js + @deepgram/sdk. Epic 2 uses Python + deepgram-sdk per spec requirements.

git_situation.problem: No common ancestor - unrelated commit histories
git_situation.root_cause: main branch starts with commit 46e5828, master starts with 5355519 - different initial commits
git_situation.solution: Must use 'git merge --allow-unrelated-histories' via terminal (not GitHub PR UI)
git_situation.merge_command: git checkout main && git merge --allow-unrelated-histories master

gotchas: KeepAlive is NOT automatic in v5.x - must send manually
Event handlers MUST be registered before start_listening()
Server sends NO response to KeepAlive messages
Use isinstance(message, bytes) to detect binary audio

environment_variables.OPENAI_API_KEY: Required if using OpenAI Think provider (gpt-4o-mini) - already in .env

investigation_notes.directories: backend/ and frontend/ exist but are empty in master branch
investigation_notes.epic1_worktree: Epic 1 files exist in worktree with Node.js implementation
investigation_notes.tech_stack_decision: Spec explicitly requires Python for Epic 2 - different from Epic 1
